# Buywhere.ai

> Cross-border product discovery with intelligent market matching. We aggregate products from Singapore, China, and global markets, then match equivalent items across borders with real-time price comparison and affiliate attribution.

## Product Catalog

- Search products: `GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/search?q={query}&market={market}&max_price={max}&currency={currency}&limit={limit}`
- Get product details: `GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/{product_id}?include_history=true`
- Cross-border match: `POST https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/match` with body `{source_product_id, target_market, match_criteria}`
- Check availability: `GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/{product_id}/availability?market={market}`
- Price history: `GET https://api.buywhere.ai/v1/products/{product_id}/prices?days={days}`

## Authentication

API key required in header: `X-Buywhere-Key: your_api_key`
OAuth 2.0 also supported: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`

## Rate Limits

- Free tier: 100 requests/minute
- Partner tier: 1,000 requests/minute
- Enterprise: Custom limits

## Response Format

All responses are JSON with these standard fields:
- `success` (boolean)
- `data` (object or array)
- `meta` (pagination, query info)
- `affiliate_links` (when applicable)

## MCP Server

Install: `npx -y @buywhere/mcp-server`
Or: `pip install buywhere-mcp`
Config: Add to Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, or any MCP host

## A2A Endpoint

Agent Card: `https://buywhere.ai/.well-known/agent.json`
Task endpoint: `https://api.buywhere.ai/a2a/tasks`
Supports streaming via Server-Sent Events

## Contact & Support

- API docs: https://docs.buywhere.ai
- Status: https://status.buywhere.ai
- Support: agents@buywhere.ai
